name: Sofia Rodriguez
key_complexity: Mixed income, Schedule C business expenses, mileage log, receipt photos, home office
narrative: Sofia is a freelance photographer who also works part-time at a gallery. She has multiple 1099-NECs from clients (some emailed as PDFs, one she photographed with her phone as a JPG). She tracks her mileage in an Excel spreadsheet, snaps photos of receipts with her iPhone (HEIC format), and keeps home office measurements in a text file. Her bank statements come as PDFs from Chase. This persona tests the agent's ability to handle image OCR, spreadsheet parsing, and mixed format processing for Schedule C.
